description: A dev agent's structured work product for one unit. For this workflow the dev produces the work product as TEXT (analysis / patch-text / doc-content), not a direct write to a real repo.

unit_id.description: The unit_id this work product satisfies (echoes the unit).

summary.description: One or two sentences: what was produced and how it meets the goal.

work_product.description: The actual deliverable content for the unit: the analysis, the patch text, or the document body. This is what reviewers assess.
